CVE-2024-34490.title: In Maxima through 5.47.0 before 51704c, the plotting facilities m ...
CVE-2024-34490.summary: In Maxima through 5.47.0 before 51704c, the plotting facilities make use of predictable names under /tmp. Thus, the contents may be controlled by a local attacker who can create files in advance with these names. This affects, for example, plot2d.
